= Sample Champions League 2024/25 =

▪ League, Matchday 1

Wed Sep/18 2024
21:00  Real Madrid (ESP)   v   VfB Stuttgart (GER)  3-1  @ Santiago Bernabeu

▪ League, Matchday 2

Tue Oct/1 2024
18:45  VfB Stuttgart (GER)   v   Real Madrid (ESP)  1-1  @ MHPArena

▪ Finals, Round of 16

Wed Mar/5 2025
21:00  Real Madrid (ESP)   v   VfB Stuttgart (GER)  2-0  @ Santiago Bernabeu
